title: Crispy Dutch Frittata
description: A tasty and easy-to-make breakfast dish with a crispy crust and a fluffy interior. Perfect for a quick morning meal.
instructions: Whisk together the eggs and set aside.
In a skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped frittata and cook until lightly browned.
Pour in the whisked eggs and cook until the edges start to set.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 2 minutes.
Use a spatula to loosen the edges from the skillet.
Slide the frittata onto a plate and serve hot.
If desired, drizzle with additional oil and sprinkle with chopped herbs.
